designSystem.style: Dark-first organic UI with warm forest greens and amber-orange accents. Earthy tones reflect freshness and sustainability. Rounded corners and layered card surfaces create a friendly, approachable feel for home cooks.

screens: Fridge — ingredient list with spoilage risk indicators (urgent/soon/fresh), rescue alert banner, scan/voice/manual entry, filter tabs
Forge — AI recipe suggestions ranked by rescue score, ingredient chips with urgency highlights, full recipe detail view with step-by-step instructions and leftover plan
Plan — weekly meal plan with leftover chain visualization, waste-saved metric, smart suggestion cards
Settings — profile, cooking skill level selector, kitchen equipment toggles, dietary preferences, light/dark theme toggle
